name: Strawberry Rhubarb Squares
recipeInstructions:
BROWN SUGAR WHIPPED TOPPING:
1 cup whipping cream
1/4 cup packed brown sugar
1/2 teaspoon vanilla
Heat oven to 375°F. Mix margarine, brown sugar, and vanilla in a medium bowl.
Stir in 1 cup flour, the oats, nuts, baking soda, and salt until crumbly.
Reserve 1 cup crumbly mixture.
Press remaining crumbly mixture into an ungreased square pan, 8x8x2 or 9x9x2 inches.
Mix granulated sugar, 1/3 cup flour, milk, and eggs in a large bowl until smooth. Fold in strawberries and rhubarb. Pour into the pan. Sprinkle with reserved crumbly mixture.
Bake 40-50 minutes, or until topping is golden brown and filling is set. Cool slightly. Cut into 2 1/2 or 3 inch squares. Serve with Brown Sugar Whipped Topping. Cover and refrigerate any remaining dessert and topping.
BROWN SUGAR WHIPPED TOPPING
Beat all Brown Sugar Whipped Topping ingredients in a chilled small bowl with an electric mixer on high speed until stiff.
